meaning: n.[希传] 利安得(海洛的情人)
examples: It is hard to find a pure and perfect love like that of Hero and Leander among our boys and girls nowadays.
In ancient Greece, the torch of Hero, the priestess, shone on the eyes of Leander, who swam across the bay every night.
An ancient town of Asia Minor on the Asiatic coast of the Hellespont in modern-day Turkey. It was the scene of the legendary tale of Hero and Leander.
In 2008, doubles specialist Leander Paes was struggling with his game and watching his ranking slip.
"It's very flattering to be asked, " said Cracknell, who will row for Leander Club in the London event.
